summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Agent Builder features. All tests passed - page loads correctly, displays real stats (1117 occupations, 18796 tasks, 31290 skills), shows top automation opportunities on load, quick access buttons work, search returns results, package view displays tasks with automation scores, skills with importance bars, knowledge and tools sections. Export buttons (JSON, JSONL, CSV, Python) are visible and clickable. Navigation from homepage to Agent Builder works correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent Builder page fully tested. All core features working: page load, stats display, automation opportunities, quick access buttons, search, package view with tasks/skills/knowledge/tools, export buttons. Backend APIs all passing: /api/stats, /api/automation-goldmines, /api/search, /api/occupations/{code}, /api/occupations/{code}/tasks, /api/occupations/{code}/skills, /api/occupations/{code}/knowledge, /api/occupations/{code}/tools, /api/automation-opportunities, /api/featured.
